# Strides Therapeutic Services

> Locally owned, BCBA-operated autism and behavioral health clinic at 204 SE Stonemill Drive, STE 270, Vancouver, WA 98684 — ABA therapy, autism diagnostic assessments ($1,495 flat fee, results in as little as 2 weeks), WA DDA and Oregon DDS services, consultation, and community programs serving Vancouver WA, Camas, Clark County, and the Portland OR metro. Phone: (360) 622-2253.

## Services

- [Our Services](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services): Overview of all six service lines with pricing and eligibility starting points.
- [ABA Therapy](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/aba-therapy): Individualized, evidence-based ABA in clinic, home, school, and community settings across Oregon and Washington.
- [Autism Diagnostic Assessments](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/autism-diagnostic-assessments): $1,495 flat-fee autism evaluation completed in as little as 2 weeks, using FDA-authorized EarliPoint eye-tracking technology (children up to age 8) alongside MD/PsyD/BCBA clinical evaluation.
- [WA DDA Services](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/wa-dda): Life skills, staff and family consultation, stabilization, community respite, and positive behavior support plans for Clark and Cowlitz Counties.
- [Oregon DDS Services](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/or-dds): Functional behavior assessments, positive behavior support plan development, and ongoing behavioral consultation in all Oregon counties.
- [Consultation & Training](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/consultation-training): Advanced behavioral consultation, crisis stabilization support, and staff training for hospitals, providers, schools, and residential programs.
- [Social Groups & Community Respite](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/services/social-groups-respite): Structured social skills groups (4-hour sessions from $75) and DDA-funded community respite at the East Vancouver center.

## About

- [About Strides](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/about): The practice's story, values, and who it serves — 300+ individuals supported by 40+ clinicians across Oregon and Washington.
- [Our Team](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/team): Founders Hannah Schmidt, M.S., BCBA, LBA and Elsie Herring, M.S., BCBA, LBA, plus clinical partners including a developmental pediatrician (MD) and PsyD, BCBA.

## Resources

- [Home](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/): Practice overview, accepted funding sources, and intake starting points.
- [Contact](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/contact): Phone, email, address, hours (Mon–Fri 8:30 AM–4:30 PM), and intake request form.

## Guides

- [How Much Does an Autism Evaluation Cost?](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/blog/how-much-does-an-autism-evaluation-cost): Typical US autism assessment costs, why prices vary, insurance considerations, and Strides' $1,495 flat-fee option with results in as little as 2 weeks.
- [Does Medicaid Cover ABA Therapy?](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/insurance/does-medicaid-cover-aba-therapy): How Medicaid (Apple Health in WA, OHP in OR) covers ABA therapy under EPSDT, prior authorization, and DDA/DDS funding paths.
- [Adult Autism Diagnosis in Vancouver, WA](https://www.stridestherapeutics.com/adult-autism-diagnosis/vancouver-wa): Autism assessments for adults in Vancouver WA and the Portland OR metro — process, cost, and what a diagnosis changes.
